---
title: "N: Nervous system"
date: "2026-02-08"
---

| Level 2 code | Description |
| ---: | :--- |
| N01 | Anesthetics |
| N02 | Analgesics |
| N03 | Antiepileptics |
| N04 | Anti-Parkinson drugs |
| N05 | Psycholeptics |
| N06 | Psychoanaleptics |
| N07 | Other nervous system drugs |

: ATC N level 2 codes {#tbl-atc-n-lvl-2 tbl-colwidths="[20, 80]"}
